asset_index_fuzzy_search|assets_content|Fuzzy-search the Asset Registry under path_prefix (default /Game). On vague but domain-scoped user asks (e.g. something in project assets, blueprint-ish, material-like), prefer one bounded call with a topical query plus narrow path_prefix over asking the user for a keyword first; ask only if results are empty and the user text has no usable token. If query is missing or empty, you must pass a narrow path_prefix (e.g. /Game/Blueprints). Invalid shape examples: `{}` or empty query with no path_prefix. Enumeration stops after max_assets_to_scan or max_wall_ms (default 12s, max 120s)—see truncated, timed_out, assets_visited. Prefer explicit query + path_prefix for performance. When multiple matches return, downstream tools must use object_path values from this result (or a follow-up narrowed search)—do not invent paths.|read|implemented|ask=True|agent=True

blueprint_apply_ir|blueprints|Blueprint Builder sub-turn only (agent_surfaces: blueprint_builder; omitted from default main Agent). Never call with empty {}. Tier-1 IR: event_begin_play, event_tick, call_function, branch, sequence, variables, links with node_id.PinName endpoints. Optional compact Blueprint IR DSL: materialize/wire EventGraph nodes for supported op types (overlap, timers, variables, calls, etc.). Prefer blueprint_graph_patch for arbitrary UK2Node types or when IR ops/merge_policy are awkward; use this when the compact op set matches. blueprint_path must be an object_path from asset_index_fuzzy_search or asset_registry_query—never a guessed name when multiple assets matched. Use create_if_missing + parent_class for new BPs under /Game; pair with blueprint_compile. Minimal shape: blueprint_path + nodes[] + links[]. Optional layout_mode (single_row/multi_strand) and wire_knots override defaults when auto_layout runs. blueprint_path must be a Blueprint asset path (/Game/...Asset.Asset), not a level actor path. Not for UMG Designer layout.|write|implemented|ask=False|agent=True

blueprint_compile|blueprints|Blueprint Builder sub-turn only (agent_surfaces: blueprint_builder; not on default main Agent). Compile a Blueprint and return diagnostics. Use after blueprint_graph_patch, blueprint_apply_ir, or other graph edits to validate/fix compile state; not for graph discovery (use blueprint_get_graph_summary or blueprint_export_ir). Use format_graphs to run in-process graph layout on script graphs before compile when graphs should be laid out.|write|implemented|ask=False|agent=True

blueprint_composite_lifecycle_print|blueprints|Blueprint Builder sub-turn only (agent_surfaces: blueprint_builder). Composite (Tier-1): wires UKismetSystemLibrary::PrintString after ReceiveBeginPlay or ReceiveTick without authoring raw IR. Parameters: blueprint_path, optional graph_name (default EventGraph), lifecycle begin_play/tick, optional message. Implemented via internal blueprint_apply_ir — same merge/append rules as manual IR.|write|implemented|ask=False|agent=True

blueprint_graph_import_t3d|blueprints|Atomic graph mutation: resolve __UAI_G_NNNNNN__ placeholders then ImportNodesFromText on the target Kismet graph. Writable /Game path only. Not for AnimGraph/state-machine graphs—use blueprint_graph_patch on EventGraph when preflight says CanImportNodesFromText is false.|write|implemented|ask=False|agent=True

blueprint_graph_list_pins|blueprints|Read-only: pins[] (name, direction, category, optional default_value). Needs blueprint_path and node_ref OR guid (real graph GUID). Does not resolve patch_id strings from other tool calls.|read|implemented|ask=True|agent=True

blueprint_graph_patch|blueprints|Blueprint Builder sub-turn only (agent_surfaces: blueprint_builder; not on default main Agent). Anti-pattern: T3D placeholders __UAI_G_NNNNNN__ are invalid here — use real guid:UUID from blueprint_graph_introspect or patch_id from this batch. Primary UE 5.7 graph mutator: ops[] on blueprint_path (/Game) and graph_name. create_node (UK2Node), create_comment (boxes + member_node_refs), connect, break_link (splice/reroute), splice_on_link (break + wire through insert_patch_id), set_pin_default, add_variable, remove_node, move_node. auto_layout defaults true with layout_scope patched_nodes (only nodes created this batch); layout_scope full_graph reformats entire script graph; layout_mode / wire_knots match blueprint_apply_ir. Insert-between flow: create_node middle → break_link or splice_on_link → connect data pins as needed, all in one ops[]. Response adds layout_applied, layout_nodes_positioned, formatter_available.|write|implemented|ask=False|agent=True
